Description: Deliver a focused white-label transition product for partner firms (solo, boutique, outplacement) with branded delivery, mixed-seniority program tracks, cohort operations, trust/governance, and pilot-to-paid packaging.

Summary: Define white-label PRD and execution guardrails
Description: Finalize MVP scope, non-goals, rollout constraints, and decision rights so partner requests do not create roadmap sprawl.
Acceptance Criteria: approved PRD includes in-scope, out-of-scope, success metrics, and no-custom pilot boundary; cross-functional signoff from Product, Engineering, Partnerships.

Summary: Implement tenant entity and hard data scoping
Description: Add tenant model and enforce tenant_id scoping across users, programs, cohorts, reports, and exports.
Acceptance Criteria: tenant table exists with branding and plan metadata; all read/write paths enforce tenant scoping; cross-tenant access tests pass.
Dependencies: Define white-label PRD and execution guardrails

Description: Enable firm logo, color theme, and branded email/digest template settings with safe defaults.
Acceptance Criteria: firm admin can set logo and primary colors; branded email preview and digest preview render correctly; fallback default branding works.
Dependencies: Implement tenant entity and hard data scoping

Summary: Ship role model and permission matrix
Description: Implement firm_admin, counselor, participant, sponsor_viewer roles with explicit permissions and audit-safe access control.
Acceptance Criteria: role assignment UI exists for firm admins; permission matrix enforced for key surfaces; unauthorized access attempts are blocked and logged.
Dependencies: Implement tenant entity and hard data scoping

Description: Add program entity and two MVP tracks: executive_transition and professional_transition with configurable templates.
Acceptance Criteria: program creation flow supports selecting track; each track has separate language and milestone template; track can be changed only by firm_admin.
Dependencies: Implement tenant entity and hard data scoping | Ship role model and permission matrix

Description: Build track-aware onboarding checklists, milestone copy, and first-week goals for executive and non-executive participants.
Acceptance Criteria: executive and professional templates are editable at tenant level; first-week checklist completion is captured as events; onboarding starts in under 10 minutes.

Description: Deliver cohort view for activation, momentum, stall risk, overdue actions, and intervention queue by cohort.
Acceptance Criteria: firm admin and counselor can filter cohorts; at-risk participants are ranked with clear rationale; dashboard loads with agreed performance target under normal cohort size.

Description: Provide one-screen what-changed view before sessions: activity delta, stalled lanes, overdue actions, and next recommended move.
Acceptance Criteria: counselor can complete prep in under 2 minutes; snapshot includes changes since last session; snapshot usage is instrumented.

Summary: Ship action-plan and weekly loop tracking
Description: Add structured action plan with due dates, reminders, completion tracking, and weekly loop completion status.
Acceptance Criteria: participants receive reminders; completion states are visible to counselor and participant; weekly loop completion metric is queryable by cohort.

Summary: Add outcomes event schema and KPI dictionary
Description: Implement standardized event model and metric dictionary: activation_complete, session_prep_viewed, weekly_loop_complete, interview_stage_advance, offer_recorded.
Acceptance Criteria: events are emitted with tenant, program, track, and cohort dimensions; metric dictionary published and linked to dashboards; data QA checks pass.
Dependencies: Add program and track configuration | Launch cohort operations dashboard

Description: Build weekly snapshot export with KPI trends, risk summary, interventions, and claims-context metadata.
Acceptance Criteria: export includes generated_by and generated_at fields; report has directional vs validated claims context; CSV and PDF outputs available.
Dependencies: Add outcomes event schema and KPI dictionary

Summary: Implement audit events and trust pack surfaces
Description: Log access, role changes, and report exports; publish trust artifacts and data boundary statement for partner due diligence.
Acceptance Criteria: audit_event records created for key actions; trust page includes role boundaries and claims policy; legal/procurement review checklist is complete.
Dependencies: Ship role model and permission matrix | Generate weekly sponsor/internal report export

Summary: Package pricing and billing for three partner tiers
Description: Implement billing configuration and sales packaging for Solo, Boutique, and Outplacement tiers with included participants and overage rules.
Acceptance Criteria: tier rules are configurable in admin; invoice line items reflect base fee plus overage; annual prepay discount is correctly applied in quote calculator.
Dependencies: Define white-label PRD and execution guardrails

Summary: Create pilot onboarding kit and conversion playbook
Description: Deliver pilot start checklist, week-1 checkpoint, midpoint review, closeout template, and pilot-to-paid decision flow.
Acceptance Criteria: pilot checklist used by all pilot accounts; closeout template includes renewal recommendation and KPI delta; playbook is published for Partnerships.
Dependencies: Implement audit events and trust pack surfaces | Package pricing and billing for three partner tiers

Summary: Run pilot validation and publish case-study package
Description: Execute pilot validation with at least three partners and compile case-study assets with approval flags.
Acceptance Criteria: minimum 3 pilots launched; at least 40% pilot-to-paid conversion; 2 approved case studies captured with named or permissioned proof blocks.
Dependencies: Create pilot onboarding kit and conversion playbook | Generate weekly sponsor/internal report export
